'''Yon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], a member of a cleaning crew reporting to [[Jakaitis]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Arrizza]] impersonated him when sneaking into the [[Bakur Memorial Building|Bakuran Senate Complex]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
